hotels.name: Shangri-La Shenyang
hotels.description_fr:
Since its magnificent debut, Shangri-La Shenyang has stood in the core area of Qingnian Avenue. Ideally positioned at the urban gold hub, the hotel neighbors high-end commercial landmarks such as Mixc and Kerry Center, with easy access to the Industrial Exhibition Hall Station (Metro Line 2) within walking distance. It offers seamless 30-minute connectivity to both Shenyang Taoxian International Airport and Shenyang North Railway Station, while placing historical treasures like the Shenyang Imperial Palace and Zhang Xueliang's Former Residence within effortless reach for a culturally immersive journey.

The hotel boasts 383 elegant guestrooms and 58 serviced apartments, starting from a generous 42 square meters to outline a refined lifestyle.

hotels.name: Crowne Plaza Suzhou by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
Crowne Plaza Suzhou is ideally located in Suzhou Industrial Park, against the scenic backdrop of beautiful Jinji Lake. The luxurious hotel offers a spa, a fitness centre and free parking.

The stylish rooms of Crowne Plaza are fitted with flat-screen cable TV, a minibar and tea/coffee making facilities. Rooms are spacious and offer either lake or garden view.

Guests can take a refreshing dip at the indoor or outdoor pool, or simply relax in the sauna rooms. The hotel also offers a business centre, as well as a tour desk to assist in travel arrangements.

There are a grand total of 6 dining options at Crowne Plaza Suzhou. Sun Seeker buffet restaurant serves a variety of Chinese, Asian and International cuisines while Prince Restaurant Chinese restaurant features Cantonese delicacies.
